content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Required Remainder". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1374/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. Each test case contains two integers n and k.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the required remainder.

code.Python3:
t = int(input())
for _ in range(t):
    n, k = map(int, input().split())
    print(n % k)
